rootCause: stl-pi_cluster_stack stopped bundling cad/pi_cluster/pi_carrier.scad with stack mounts and left pi_carrier_stack_carrier_level_{mode}.stl renders under carriers/ as if they were printable parts. The packager only copies STL outputs from stl/pi_cluster, so the SCAD source and preview carrier_level renders are misplaced.
resolution: Update scripts/package_stl_artifacts.py to copy cad/pi_cluster/pi_carrier.scad into stl-pi_cluster_stack/carriers/, move pi_carrier_stack_carrier_level_{mode}.stl into preview/, and keep only printable posts, fan adapters, fan walls, and carrier plates under carriers/.
